name: Pressed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Stew the chicken, celery, and carrots with the bouillon cubes until the chicken is cooked through and almost all the liquid has been absorbed.
2. Remove the chicken from the pot and shred it using a sharp knife or shredding tool.
3. In a food processor, grind together the shredded chicken, remaining celery, carrots, and toast until you have a coarse mixture.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the flour with 1/4 cup of water to create a thin gravy-like consistency.
5. Combine the ground ingredients from the food processor with the flour mixture until well blended.
6. Transfer the mixture to a loaf dish lined with parchment paper or waxed paper.
7. Press the mixture firmly into the dish and place it in the refrigerator to set for at least 2 hours, preferably overnight.
8. Once firm, slice the pressed chicken and serve.
Serves 8
